build.buildCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "app" ]; then bash app/build.sh; elif [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "app2" ]; then bash app2/build.sh; else echo "Unsupported RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME=$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" >&2; exit 1; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "app" ]; then bash app/start.sh; elif [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "app2" ]; then bash app2/start.sh; else echo "Unsupported RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME=$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" >&2; exit 1; fi
